Container.Name: VolumeVault
Container.Overview:
VolumeVault is a self-hosted application for managing Docker volume and host path backups with safe restores powered by offen/docker-volume-backup.
This template mirrors the attached compose file and keeps the same bind mounts, port mapping, and environment values.
Generate an APP_KEY with: docker run --rm ghcr.io/darkdragon14/volumevault:latest php artisan key:generate --show
Open the web UI after startup and complete the onboarding flow to create the first administrator account.
https://volumevault.darkdragon14.dev/
https://github.com/Darkdragon14/VolumeVault

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket used to discover volumes and run backup tasks

Config.Name: APP_KEY
Config.Description: Application encryption key. Generate this before first start and keep it safe. Generate an APP_KEY with: docker run --rm ghcr.io/darkdragon14/volumevault:latest php artisan key:generate --show
